title: Heart Revamp
body:
The vanilla textures for the heart types are iconic but flawed in my opinion. The shading feels oddly flat in comparison to the rest of the modern textures for the game. It's somewhat obvious that all of them besides the frozen heart textures are programmer art, so I decided to give them a light revamp. The withered hearts are notoriously hard to distinguish from empty hearts which is Not Good™ so I made it a bit brighter and slightly purplish. I made the empty hearts darker as well for the same reason.
I hope you enjoy, hypothetical audience.
